final_prompt.prompt:
Create a brand promotional poster for RAN QIU with a warm autumn atmosphere and poetic, serene visual experience.

Style/medium: needs an 东方美学 minimalist aesthetic with natural poetry and warmth — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: needs generous negative space and shallow depth-of-field treatment — exact framing is yours
Subject: must include the RAN QIU brand wordmark as a focal element alongside natural autumn elements
Scene/backdrop: needs a warm autumn atmosphere — exact scene is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a golden-hour, warm and healing atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: must be #8B3A1E (深秋棕红) dominant, with #E8DCCB (米色) and #D4A574 (金棕色)
Materials/textures: needs a natural, organic surface treatment — exact texture weight is yours
Text (verbatim): must include "RAN QIU"
Constraints: 
Avoid:
